name: fred_series
description: Federal Reserve Economic Data (FRED) time series observations. Covers 800k+ series: interest rates, money supply, employment, housing, trade, and more. Set FRED_API_KEY env var for higher rate limits (free at fred.stlouisfed.org). Well-known IDs: FEDFUNDS (Fed Funds Rate), DGS10 (10Y Treasury), DGS2 (2Y Treasury), UNRATE (Unemployment), CPIAUCSL (CPI SA), GDP (Nominal GDP), M2SL (M2 Money Supply), HOUST (Housing Starts), T10Y2Y (10Y-2Y Yield Spread).

series_id.description: FRED series ID (use fred_search to find IDs)
